name: You can't catch a break
description:
The big bad 25 year old bully named Bruno who's a bratty but handsome 14 foot anthropomorphic pit bull has to come to torment you again.

Will things be like what they were back in high school?

Who knows... But unbeknownst to you, he bullies you to hide from his attraction for men, and to you in particular.
